name: contact
description: A person: lead, prospect, customer, partner, or team member.

name: company
description: An organization: account, prospect company, or partner.

name: conversation
description: A single communication event: email, call, meeting, or note.

name: signal
description: A buying or engagement signal observed for a contact or company.

name: task
description: A discrete unit of work assigned to an agent or human.

name: orchestrator_log
description: An engine audit event: dispatch, subagent call, error, or status change.

name: dispatch_route
description: A routing rule pairing a filter with a target operation.
